---
title: "Casual Inference"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-blog
    contents: blog/posts/*/index.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  - id: recent-projects
    contents: projects/*/index.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
---

::: {.hero-section}

![](images/profile-placeholder.png){.profile-photo fig-alt="Photo of Jonathan Pearce"}

# Welcome to Casual Inference

A personal site for sharing projects, blog posts, datasets, and resources on **data analytics**, **machine learning**, and **statistics**.

[GitHub](https://github.com/Jonathan-Pearce){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-sm}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-pearce){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-sm}

:::

---

## Recent Blog Posts

:::{#recent-blog}
:::

[See all posts →](blog/index.qmd)

## Recent Projects

:::{#recent-projects}
:::

[See all projects →](projects/index.qmd)
